{{Location | Name=Joshua Tree National Park | Guid=3035-7981 | Deck=Joshua Tree is a national park located in both Riverside County and San Benardino County in California. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Flip_Off,Concepts/Human,Concepts/Raccoon | Objects=Objects/Joshua_Tree,Objects/Rock,Objects/Sand,Objects/Tree,Objects/Tree_Stump | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/North_America,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3449114-913068642.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Jungle Planet | Guid=3035-8156 | Deck=The '''Jungle Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Sisyphus is fought. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The '''Jungle Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Sisyphus is fought.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Long Beach | Guid=3035-8339 | Deck=Long Beach is a coastal city in Los Angeles County, California. | Characters=Characters/Snoop_Dogg | Concepts=Concepts/Hip_Hop_2771 | Objects=Objects/Burrito,Objects/Car,Objects/Hamburger | Locations=Locations/Beach,Locations/Burger_King,Locations/California,Locations/Clothing_Store,Locations/Earth,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/McDonalds,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/Restaurant,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/Wendys | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3672917-credit-20long-20beach-20convention-20-26-20visitors-20bureau-skylineextended_jpg_webp.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3672917-credit-20long-20beach-20convention-20-26-20visitors-20bureau-skylineextended_jpg_webp.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Long Beach is a coastal city in Los Angeles County, California.

{{Location | Name=Long Island | Guid=3035-8326 | Deck=Long Island is a densely populated continental island in southeastern New York state, extending into the Atlantic Ocean. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Atlantic_Ocean,Locations/New_York,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3653271-4234700952-skyli.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3653271-4234700952-skyli.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_small,square_medium,square_tiny,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Long Island is a densely populated continental island in southeastern New York state, extending into the Atlantic Ocean.

{{Location | Name=Lost City | Guid=3035-8049 | Deck=A fictional location depicted in The ClueFinders 3rd Grade Adventures: Mystery of Mathra. It is an ancient, abandoned city inside the Numerian rain forest. | Characters=Characters/Brainstorm_50671,Characters/Lefty_50667,Characters/Righty,Characters/The_Dragons,Characters/The_Orb_50670,Characters/Yorrick,Characters/Zep,Characters/Zoe_50666 | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Numeria | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/7/73970/3464015-1838041890-latest.png}}

It is an ancient, abandoned city inside the Numerian rain forest.

{{Location | Name=Lost Lake | Guid=3035-8357 | Deck=Lost Lake is a lake in Mount Hood National Forest. | Characters=Characters/Addy_Walker,Characters/Boozer,Characters/Deacon_St_John,Characters/Iron_Mike,Characters/Rikki_Patil,Characters/Skizzo | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Forest,Locations/Hood_River_County,Locations/Lake,Locations/Lost_Lake_Resort,Locations/Mount_Hood_National_Forest,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732373-famous_view_of_lost_lake_mount_hood_in_the_distance.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3732373-famous_view_of_lost_lake_mount_hood_in_the_distance.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_small,square_small,square_tiny,scale_medium,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Lost Lake is a lake in Mount Hood National Forest.
